titles.text: Simple Characters 2000 Series Vol. 09: Tsuri Kichi Sanpei - The Tsuri
Simple キャラクター 2000 シリーズ Vol. 09 釣りキチ三平 The 釣り

descriptions.text: Tsuri Kichi Sanpei - The Tsuri is a fishing game based on the anime Tsuri Kichi Sanpei, the gameplay is in first person perspective, the game features different fishing spots.
